source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for crisp operational UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for summit monitoring labels, numerals, headings, body text, and alerts.
layout: Compact monitoring grids, fine frost borders, granite-stable panels, 8px component radius, and sharp chart/table surfaces tuned for fast sensor scanning.

prompts.label: Transparent rime ice motif source
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a rime ice feather motif for a Morphous design-system asset, isolated full subject, no text.
Subject: A cluster of wind-grown rime ice feathers, hoarfrost plumes, and delicate white ice needles attached to a small granite summit rock edge; white ice, pale sky-blue refraction, cool granite gray undertones; crisp crystalline feather forms shaped by mountain summit wind.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include the full feather silhouettes and a small grounding fragment of granite, no cropping.
Lighting/mood: crisp alpine morning light, clean cold air, monitoring-system precision, high micro-detail, sharp edges.
Transparent workflow: create the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Keep the subject fully separated from the background with crisp edges and generous padding. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no mountain landscape background, no snowfield, no people, no animal feathers, no cartoon style, no text, no watermark, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Rime Ice" derived from the visible transparent rime ice feather motif on granite.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from white rime ice feathers, pale sky blue refraction, granite gray speckle, and a mountain summit monitoring context. This light board is the primary reference for coding a crisp monitoring system.
Canvas: 3840x2160 16:9 board, high-resolution, crisp readable UI labels.
Required visible sections: Morphous Rime Ice, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance; monitoring dashboard numerals must be large and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, summit sensor metric cards, wind/temperature/ice-load charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, crisp operational monitoring interface, compact precise grid, 8px card radius, fine frost borders, granite separators, sky-blue focus rings, white ice surfaces.
Palette intent: white ice, sky blue, granite, blue shadow, frost cyan, graphite warning contrast only where necessary.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no marketing hero layout, no unreadably tiny text, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Rime Ice".

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Rime Ice light design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible rime ice feather motif and the visible light-mode board as references. Preserve the same sections, monitoring dashboard structure, mountain summit sensor context, Japanese typography coverage, component coverage, fine frost borders, granite texture samples, sky-blue focus states, and crisp operational mood.
Canvas: 3840x2160 16:9 board, high-resolution, crisp readable UI labels.
Required visible sections: Morphous Rime Ice, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: deep blue-shadow summit background, ice-white text, granite charcoal panels, pale sky-blue and frost-cyan primary accents, fine translucent rime borders, subtle granite speckle surfaces, compact dashboard cards for wind, temperature, visibility, humidity, and ice load.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance; monitoring dashboard numerals must be large and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, sensor metric cards, wind/temperature/ice-load charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Constraints: no neon overload, no unrelated saturated colors, no flat pure-black-only background, no purple gradient theme, no unreadably tiny text, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Rime Ice".
